records.asset_name: Enemy idle, intent, attack, block, hit, defeat animations
records.notes: 2026-05-08 human review: candidate_08 soft-eroded component sprite preview accepted as good. Legal/license review and runtime integration remain blocked pending final approval.
records.final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: Matchatro enemy_animation_set chroma-key source sheet for sprite pipeline
Primary request: Create a clean complete 8-frame armored undead enemy animation source sheet on one 1536x1024 canvas, arranged in exact 4 columns by 2 rows. This is a source sheet for deterministic chroma-key extraction and sprite normalization.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid chroma-key background color #00FFFF covering every background pixel. No checkerboard, no transparency, no gradient, no texture, no scenery, no shadows on the background.
Subject: same compact skeleton warlord enemy in every frame, front-facing three-quarter view, dark iron horned helmet, skull face with orange eyes, blackened armor, red torn cloth, one axe held close to the body and one round shield. Eight readable full-body poses: idle, ready, axe raised, short close slash, recoil, recover, shield guard, idle return. Keep the same character, same outfit, same silhouette family, same scale, same facing direction across all frames.
Style/medium: polished hand-painted 2D fantasy game sprite sheet, crisp contours, clean cel-painted highlights, production asset tone.
Composition/framing: exact 4x2 row-major sheet. Each frame occupies a 384x512 slot. Make the enemy 15 percent smaller than the slot, centered horizontally, feet aligned near the same bottom baseline. Leave wide clear cyan background between frames. No frame dividers, no white bars, no cropped axe, no cropped shield, no cropped limbs, no overlapping frames, no detached body fragments. Every full body and weapon fits inside its slot with at least 48 px padding. No wide slash arcs; only tiny orange sparks next to the axe.
Color palette: dark iron, bone ivory, black leather, muted red cloth, warm orange eyes, bronze highlights. Do not use #00FFFF or near-cyan key color inside the enemy body, weapon, shield, antialias edges, glows, or particles.
Lighting/mood: threatening but readable, game-scale clarity.
Constraints: opaque chroma-key source only; exact 4 columns by 2 rows; flat #00FFFF background; no transparency request; no checkerboard; no labels; no text; no watermark; no poster composition; no extra characters; no duplicated detached body parts; no cropped frames; no large slash arcs or projectiles.
Avoid: key-color spill, background texture, frame borders, white separator bars, severed limbs, inconsistent armor, huge effects that leave the slot, side-facing poses, close-up portraits, cropped weapon, cropped effects, split body parts.
records.generation_mode: built-in imagegen chroma-key fallback plus deterministic adaptive extraction

records.final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: Matchatro game UI tutorial onboarding pack source image for chroma-key extraction
Primary request: Regenerate tutorial_onboarding_ui_pack candidate_06 as a clean fantasy roguelite tutorial UI kit on one 1536x1024 canvas.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid chroma-key background color #FF00FF covering every background pixel. No checkerboard, no transparency, no gradient, no texture, no shadows on the background.
Subject: separated tutorial/onboarding UI components: one large empty tutorial dialogue panel, one smaller hint panel, one compact input/control hint strip, a hand-tap gesture icon with arrow, a circular highlight ring, a confirm/continue button, one question badge, one warning badge. Dark stone panels with gold trim and cyan jewel accents matching existing Matchatro fantasy UI style.
Style/medium: polished hand-painted 2D game UI asset sheet, crisp edges, production-ready icons and panels.
Composition/framing: components separated with generous gaps, no overlap, no cropping, no text labels or letters. Keep all objects fully inside canvas with 48 px safe margin.
Color palette: black stone, dark charcoal, warm gold trim, cyan jewels, teal button fill, red/orange warning. Do not use magenta, pink, purple, or #FF00FF anywhere inside the UI components, glows, reflections, jewels, shadows, or antialiasing.
Lighting/mood: clean readable high fantasy UI, subtle internal highlights only on the assets.
Constraints: opaque chroma-key source only; background must be flat #FF00FF; asset elements must not contain magenta or pink; no leftover magenta artifact inside any component; no embedded text, no watermark, no mockup screen, no poster layout.
Avoid: transparent background request, checkerboard, gradients in background, key-color spill, magenta/pink/purple details, labels, words, numbers, UI text.
